references.text: Sleumer, H. 1971. Cardiopteridaceae. Flora Malesiana series 1, 7: 93-96.
Sleumer, H. 1971. Icacinaceae. Flora Malesiana series 1, 7: 1-87.

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 16 October 2021

species.citation: Blume , Rumphia 3 (1847) 207 ; Merrill, PJS 2c (1907) 423; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 493; Sleumer, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 7 (1971) 95; Type: from Ambon.
species.distribution: Bismarck Arch, Moluccas, New Guinea, Philippines, Sulawesi. BOHOL, CATANDUANES, LEYTE, LUZON: Benguet, Camarines, Camarines Sur, Sorsogon, MINDANAO: Bukidnon, Davao, Davao del Sur, Lanao del Sur, MINDORO, NEGROS, PALAWAN, ?PANAY, SAMAR.
species.notes: Lowland and medium elevation forests and forest edges. (?-)1460m.

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 15 October 2021

species.citation: (Merr.) R.A.Howard , J. Arnold Arbor. 21 (1940) 472 ; Sleumer, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 7 (1971) 6; ≡ Villaresia latifolia Merr. , PJS 14 (1919) 415 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 488.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. CEBU (photos), PALAWAN, SAMAR.

species.citation: (Merr.) R.A.Howard , J. Arnold Arbor. 21 (1940) 474 ; Sleumer, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 7 (1971) 7; ≡ Chariessa philippinensis (Merr.) Sleumer , Notizbl. Bot. Gart. Berlin-Dahlem 15 (1940) 229; ≡ Villaresia philippinensis Merr. , PJS 14 (1919) 414 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 488.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. LUZON: Ilocos Norte.

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 16 October 2021

species.citation: (Baill.) Becc. , Malesia 1 (1877) 123 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 491; Sleumer, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 7 (1971) 20; ≡ Phlebocalymna calleryana Baill. , Adansonia, 1st Sér. 9 (1869) 147.
species.distribution: Borneo, Moluccas, Philippines, Sulawesi, Taiwan. ALABAT, BABUYAN ISLS, BATAN, CAGBAN (photos), DALUPIRI, LUZON: Albay, Aurora, Bataan, Batangas, Benguet (photos), Bulacan, Cagayan, Camarines Norte, Camarines Sur, Ilocos Norte, Isabela, La Union, Laguna, NCR, Pampanga, Pangasinan, Quezon, Rizal, Sorsogon, Zambales, PALAWAN, PANAY (photos), POLO, SAMAR.
species.notes: Primary lowland (sometimes littoral, also second-growth) forests, on clayey, sometimes volcanic soil. 0-250(-750)m.

species.citation: Elmer , LPB 1 (1908) 315 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 491; Sleumer, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 7 (1971) 19. = Gonocaryum grandifolium Merr. , PJS 17 (1920) 278 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 491.
species.distribution: Borneo, Philippines. DINAGAT, LEYTE, LUZON: Sorsogon, MINDANAO: Agusan del Norte, PANAY, SAMAR, SULU ARCHIPELAGO, TAWI-TAWI.
species.notes: Primary dipterocarp forests (rarely in secondary), along river, apparently scattered. 0-300m to 500-550m (photos).
